shared.pilotNotice: This module is in structured pilot access — previews reflect product direction, not full general availability
shared.comingSoonNotice: This module is on the product roadmap — previews reflect planned capability direction, not live product availability

cbamComplianceConsole.title: Operational coordination for CBAM evidence and reporting readiness
cbamComplianceConsole.description: A pilot coordination layer for monitoring supplier evidence status, calculation readiness, follow-up actions and reporting-cycle progress across CBAM workflows.

positioning.title: From calculation outputs to operational CBAM readiness
positioning.description: Once supplier data collection and calculation work begins, teams need a structured view of evidence quality, open follow-ups and reporting-cycle readiness — without reverting to spreadsheet tracking.

capabilities.title: What the console is designed to coordinate
capabilities.description: Pilot capability focused on operational visibility across CBAM preparation — not a replacement for the ready Calculation Engine.

item1.title: Evidence status overview
item1.description: Track supplier submissions, quality marking and missing evidence across reporting cycles.

item2.title: Calculation readiness signals
item2.description: Surface which product lines, installations or suppliers are ready for calculation review.

item3.title: Follow-up action queue
item3.description: Organize supplier outreach, data gaps and internal review tasks in one operational view.

item4.title: Reporting-cycle progress
item4.description: Monitor preparation milestones from data intake through declaration-ready evidence packaging.

workflow.title: How teams use the console in CBAM cycles
workflow.description: Structured coordination across recurring quarterly preparation — connected to the Calculation Engine workflow.

step1.title: Scope reporting cycle
step1.description: Define product scope, supplier list and evidence requirements for the active CBAM period.

step2.title: Monitor evidence intake
step2.description: Track supplier submissions, quality flags and outstanding data requests.

step3.title: Review calculation readiness
step3.description: Identify which records are ready for embedded emissions calculation and methodology review.

step4.title: Prepare declaration handoff
step4.description: Coordinate final evidence packaging and internal sign-off before submission preparation.

item1.title: CBAM program leads
item1.description: Teams coordinating supplier outreach and quarterly reporting preparation across multiple product lines.

item2.title: Compliance operations
item2.description: Functions needing visibility into evidence status without manual spreadsheet consolidation.

item3.title: Export compliance teams
item3.description: Organizations scaling CBAM preparation beyond a single calculation workflow.

cta.title: Discuss CBAM Compliance Console pilot access with our team

ppwr.title: Structure packaging data and supplier evidence for PPWR readiness
ppwr.description: A pilot module for organizing packaging BOMs, supplier documentation, recycled-content evidence and product-family logic ahead of operational PPWR requirements.

positioning.title: Packaging compliance as a data and evidence problem
positioning.description: PPWR preparation requires material-level packaging data, supplier evidence and product-family traceability — structured before requirements become operationally binding.

capabilities.title: Pilot capability areas
capabilities.description: Focused on packaging data structuring and evidence preparation — not full regulatory certification.

item1.title: Packaging BOM organization
item1.description: Structure material compositions, component references and product-family packaging logic.

item2.title: Supplier evidence intake
item2.description: Collect packaging-related supplier declarations and supporting documentation.

item3.title: Recycled-content tracking
item3.description: Organize recycled-content evidence and supplier attestations by material and SKU.

item4.title: Documentation traceability
item4.description: Link packaging data records to evidence files and review status.

workflow.title: PPWR preparation workflow
workflow.description: Repeatable packaging data and evidence structuring aligned with the platform operating model.

step1.title: Map product packaging scope
step1.description: Identify SKUs, packaging components and supplier sources requiring documentation.

step2.title: Collect supplier packaging data
step2.description: Request material compositions, recycled-content claims and supporting evidence.

step3.title: Structure BOM and evidence links
step3.description: Organize packaging BOM records connected to supplier documentation.

step4.title: Prepare review-ready outputs
step4.description: Package structured packaging data for internal review and regulatory readiness planning.

item1.title: FMCG and packaging teams
item1.description: Organizations preparing packaging data across large product portfolios.

item2.title: Brand owners with supplier networks
item2.description: Teams coordinating packaging evidence from multiple material suppliers.

item3.title: Sustainability and compliance functions
item3.description: Groups building PPWR readiness before operational reporting cycles.

cta.title: Discuss PPWR packaging compliance pilot access

agriClimate.title: Structure agricultural climate data and farm-level evidence
agriClimate.description: A pilot product area for organizing agricultural climate data, farm-level records, producer documentation and evidence preparation in commodity-linked supply chains.

positioning.title: Agricultural supply chains need structured climate evidence
positioning.description: Commodity-linked supply chains increasingly require producer-level records, geolocation references and farm-level data organized before regulatory and buyer expectations intensify.

capabilities.title: Pilot capability areas
capabilities.description: Focused on agricultural data structuring and evidence preparation workflows.

item1.title: Farm and producer records
item1.description: Organize producer references, farm-level data and supplier documentation.

item2.title: Climate data intake
item2.description: Structure agricultural climate inputs and supporting evidence from field to supply chain.

item3.title: Geolocation evidence prep
item3.description: Prepare location-linked documentation aligned with traceability requirements.

item4.title: Evidence quality marking
item4.description: Mark data completeness and follow-up needs across producer networks.

workflow.title: Agri-climate evidence workflow
workflow.description: Disciplined data structuring for agricultural supply chain compliance preparation.

step1.title: Define supply chain scope
step1.description: Map commodities, producers and data requirements across the network.

step2.title: Collect farm-level data
step2.description: Intake producer records, climate inputs and supporting documentation.

step3.title: Structure and validate evidence
step3.description: Organize records with quality marking and gap identification.

step4.title: Prepare reporting-ready outputs
step4.description: Package structured agricultural climate evidence for review and downstream use.

item1.title: Agricultural exporters
item1.description: Organizations preparing farm-level documentation for EU-linked supply chains.

item2.title: Commodity traders
item2.description: Teams coordinating producer evidence across distributed supplier networks.

item3.title: Food and agri compliance teams
item3.description: Functions building structured climate data workflows ahead of regulatory expansion.

eudr.title: Planned due diligence workflows for deforestation-linked supply chains
eudr.description: A roadmap module for geolocation evidence, supplier declarations, risk classification and traceability documentation in commodity-linked supply chains.

positioning.title: EUDR requires structured due diligence evidence
positioning.description: Commodity-linked supply chains need repeatable workflows for geolocation data, supplier declarations and traceability documentation — built on the same supplier evidence model as CBAM.

capabilities.title: Planned capability direction
capabilities.description: Roadmap module — previews reflect planned product direction.

item1.title: Geolocation evidence management
item1.description: Organize plot-level location data and supporting documentation from suppliers.

item2.title: Supplier declaration intake
item2.description: Structured collection of supplier attestations and due diligence statements.

item3.title: Risk classification support
item3.description: Prepare documentation layers for risk assessment and review workflows.

item4.title: Traceability documentation
item4.description: Link commodity flows to evidence files across the supply chain.

workflow.title: Planned due diligence workflow
workflow.description: Structured evidence preparation from supplier intake through documentation review.

step1.title: Scope commodities and suppliers
step1.description: Define EUDR-relevant products and supplier networks requiring documentation.

step2.title: Collect geolocation and declarations
step2.description: Intake location evidence and supplier due diligence statements.

step3.title: Structure risk and traceability records
step3.description: Organize evidence with quality marking and gap tracking.

step4.title: Prepare review-ready documentation
step4.description: Package due diligence evidence for internal review and regulatory preparation.

item1.title: Commodity importers
item1.description: Organizations preparing EUDR due diligence across timber, cocoa, coffee and other commodities.

item2.title: Brand supply chain teams
item2.description: Teams coordinating geolocation evidence from multi-tier supplier networks.

item3.title: Compliance and legal functions
item3.description: Groups building deforestation due diligence documentation workflows.

cta.title: Follow the EUDR module roadmap and request updates

dpp.title: Planned product data structures for Digital Product Passport readiness
dpp.description: A roadmap module for product-level data structures, supplier evidence layers, component documentation and traceability logic ahead of DPP requirements.

positioning.title: DPP starts with structured product and supplier data
positioning.description: Manufacturers need product-level data models, component references and supplier evidence layers organized before Digital Product Passport requirements become a practical operational challenge.

capabilities.title: Planned capability direction
capabilities.description: Roadmap module — previews reflect planned product direction.

item1.title: Product data modeling
item1.description: Structure product references, component hierarchies and material attributes.

item2.title: Supplier evidence layers
item2.description: Connect component-level supplier documentation to product records.

item3.title: Documentation traceability
item3.description: Link evidence files to product and component references with review status.

item4.title: Passport readiness preparation
item4.description: Organize data outputs aligned with emerging DPP data structure expectations.

workflow.title: Planned DPP preparation workflow
workflow.description: From product scope definition through evidence-linked documentation.

step1.title: Define product scope
step1.description: Identify products, components and supplier sources requiring documentation.

step2.title: Collect component evidence
step2.description: Intake supplier documentation and material data for product structures.

step3.title: Structure passport data layers
step3.description: Organize product records connected to evidence and review status.

step4.title: Prepare readiness outputs
step4.description: Package structured product data for internal review and DPP planning.

item1.title: Manufacturers
item1.description: Product teams preparing component-level documentation for passport readiness.

item2.title: Electronics and automotive suppliers
item2.description: Organizations managing complex BOMs and multi-tier supplier evidence.

item3.title: Sustainability data teams
item3.description: Functions coordinating product-level sustainability data structures.

cta.title: Follow the Digital Product Passport roadmap

supplierEvidence.title: Planned shared supplier communication and evidence intake
supplierEvidence.description: A roadmap module for supplier outreach, structured data requests, evidence upload, quality marking and follow-up workflows shared across platform modules.

positioning.title: Supplier evidence is the shared foundation
positioning.description: Every regulatory workflow in Arvenza depends on disciplined supplier communication, structured data intake and evidence quality marking — this module extends that model as a shared platform layer.

capabilities.title: Planned capability direction
capabilities.description: Roadmap module — previews reflect planned product direction.

item1.title: Supplier outreach templates
item1.description: Structured request formats for installation-level data and supporting evidence.

item2.title: Evidence upload and intake
item2.description: Organize supplier submissions with file references and metadata.

item3.title: Quality marking and gaps
item3.description: Flag incomplete submissions and trigger follow-up actions.

item4.title: Cross-module evidence reuse
item4.description: Connect supplier records to CBAM, PPWR, EUDR and other module workflows.

workflow.title: Planned supplier evidence workflow
workflow.description: Repeatable supplier intake from outreach through evidence validation.

step1.title: Define data requirements
step1.description: Specify fields, evidence types and deadlines per supplier and product scope.

step2.title: Send structured requests
step2.description: Issue supplier outreach with clear data and documentation expectations.

step3.title: Review and mark quality
step3.description: Validate submissions, flag gaps and schedule follow-ups.

step4.title: Feed downstream modules
step4.description: Route validated evidence into calculation, reporting and compliance workflows.

item1.title: Multi-regulation exporters
item1.description: Teams collecting supplier data once and reusing evidence across CBAM and roadmap modules.

item2.title: Procurement and supplier quality
item2.description: Functions coordinating supplier documentation at scale.

item3.title: Compliance operations
item3.description: Groups replacing email-and-spreadsheet supplier tracking with structured workflows.

cta.title: Follow the Supplier Evidence Workflow roadmap

esgReporting.title: Planned ESG evidence coordination and reporting preparation
esgReporting.description: A roadmap module for ESG evidence coordination, reporting inputs, documentation traceability and review-ready workspace outputs.
esgReporting.screenshotAlt: ESG evidence and reporting workspace preview

positioning.title: ESG reporting needs the same evidence discipline
positioning.description: ESG and sustainability reporting functions face the same supplier evidence, data quality and documentation traceability challenges as regulatory compliance teams — structured in one workspace model.

capabilities.title: Planned capability direction
capabilities.description: Roadmap module — previews reflect planned product direction.

item1.title: Evidence coordination
item1.description: Organize ESG-related supplier and internal evidence in structured workflows.

item2.title: Reporting input preparation
item2.description: Structure data inputs aligned with reporting frameworks and internal review cycles.

item3.title: Documentation traceability
item3.description: Link evidence files to reporting line items with review status.

item4.title: Review-ready workspace outputs
item4.description: Package coordinated evidence for audit and disclosure preparation.

workflow.title: Planned ESG reporting workflow
workflow.description: From evidence collection through reporting input preparation.

step1.title: Define reporting scope
step1.description: Map disclosure requirements, data owners and evidence needs.

step2.title: Collect and structure evidence
step2.description: Intake supplier and internal documentation with quality marking.

step3.title: Prepare reporting inputs
step3.description: Organize validated data for framework-aligned reporting preparation.

step4.title: Review and package outputs
step4.description: Coordinate internal sign-off and audit-ready evidence packaging.

item1.description: Functions coordinating disclosure evidence across business units.
